# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.FallbackTransmission property

Fraction of sound that passes through surfaces without an [`AcousticBody`](../AcousticBody.md).

`0.0` = fully blocked

`1.0` = fully transparent

Mirrors the [`TransmissionHigh`](../AcousticMaterial/TransmissionHigh.md) band.

```csharp
public float FallbackTransmission { get; set; }
```
